UKB EᎮ

Pronounced Guh-hey, UKB EᎮ (Bobcat) is an intelligent grant acquisition platform to advance UKB's grant goals

Grant Network Explorer

Interactive visualization of federal grant opportunities across agencies and categories — filtered for UKB relevance.

Funding Analytics

Deep data insights into grant distributions, agency breakdowns, funding ranges, and upcoming deadlines.

Deadline Compliance

Automated tracking ensures you never miss a submission window or eligibility requirement.

From Opportunity to Funded Project

UKB ᎬᎮ aggregates thousands of federal grant opportunities and brings them into a single, searchable, visual platform — so your team can act fast and apply strategically.

  • Tribal & Community Grant Pathways
  • Federal Agency Opportunity Mapping
  • Deadline-Driven Action Alerts
